name: Synchro Automation
about: Smart Special Purpose Machines & Industrial Automation Solutions We design, build, and integrate automation systems to upgrade your existing machines and improve productivity.

identity.whoWeAre: We are a team of engineers with a strong mix of experience and next-generation innovation, specializing in industrial automation, PLC programming, machine vision, and machine design.
identity.vision: To bridge the gap between traditional machinery and modern automation, enabling industries to upgrade their systems for higher efficiency and Industry 4.0 readiness.
whyChooseUs: Strong focus on quality and reliability
A dynamic team combining young innovation & industry experience
whoWeServe: MNCs requiring automation and system integration
